mapper.sql: select profile_id, user_id, course_id, ability_level, concentration_score, active_score, mastery_score, interest_score, risk_score, profile_version, feature_json, last_calculated_time, create_time, update_time from sc_learning_profile
mapper.insert: insert into sc_learning_profile(user_id, course_id, ability_level, concentration_score, active_score, mastery_score, interest_score, risk_score, profile_version, feature_json, last_calculated_time, create_time, update_time) values(#{userId}, #{courseId}, #{abilityLevel}, #{concentrationScore}, #{activeScore}, #{masteryScore}, #{interestScore}, #{riskScore}, #{profileVersion}, #{featureJson}, #{lastCalculatedTime}, sysdate(), sysdate())
mapper.delete: delete from sc_learning_profile where profile_id in #{profileId}
